Name: Sebastian to Sabrina: Sebastian is a Girl
Author: Compiled by Paperplane01 with Assets from various authors and artists
Description: Turning Sebastian to a Girl using the 9-year old mod of AdarinSinner, combined with Dialogue Changes by KeionDryke, and Seasonal Outfits and Portrait by LadyoftheLight. Using Poltergeister's Seasonal Outfit mod as a base.
